title: RHCSA 10 Mock Exam C
description: Web service and network focus: httpd service setup, custom service port, SELinux port labeling, firewalld, Flatpak, client storage, NFS, autofs, users, and scheduling.

tasks: On client, recover root access and configure the client hostname. Set the root password to cinder9. Then set hostname to clientc.exam10.lab and map serverc.exam10.lab to 192.168.122.3.
On client, configure System eth1 with IPv4 address 192.168.122.62/24, gateway 192.168.122.1, and DNS 192.168.122.3.
On client, publish a web page /var/www/html/examc.html containing EXAMC and enable httpd.
On client, configure httpd to listen on TCP port 8102 and make the port usable by the web service.

On server, configure the server hostname and persistent IPv4 networking:

Hostname: serverc.exam10.lab
Hosts entry: 192.168.122.62 clientc.exam10.lab
eth1 address: 192.168.122.3/24
Gateway: 192.168.122.1
DNS resolver: 192.168.122.3
On server, create /srv/serverc10 owned by root:serverc10 with mode 2770.
On client, create and enable examctimer.timer that runs every 10 minutes.
On client, create physical volume on /dev/sdb, volume group vgc10, logical volume datac of 384 MiB, format it with XFS, and mount it persistently at /mnt/datac10.
On client, allow TCP port 8102 permanently in firewalld and reload.
On client and server, create enabled BaseOS and AppStream repository definitions with BaseOS at http://server/repo/BaseOS/ and AppStream at http://server/repo/AppStream/; disable GPG checks.
On client, create system Flatpak remote examcflatpak pointing to file:///opt/rhcsa/flatpak/repo with GPG verification disabled.
On client, install org.rhcsa.Tools from examcflatpak and leave it installed.
On client, create group teamc10, create user userc10, set password cinder9, and add the user to teamc10.
On client, allow %teamc10 to run /usr/bin/systemctl without a password.
On server, allow members of serverc10 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a password.
On client, create /var/www/html/c.html and restore its default SELinux context.
On server, publish /var/www/html/server-c.html containing RHCSA10-C and serve httpd on TCP port 8202.
On server, enable persistent systemd journal storage.
On server, create and enable serverctimer.timer so it appends SERVER-C to /var/log/serverctimer.log every 5 minutes.
On server, export /exports/exam-c to the 192.168.122.0/24 network. On client, mount server:/exports/exam-c persistently at /mnt/cprojects.
On client, add a hosts entry for serverc.exam10.lab and save the output of http://serverc.exam10.lab:8202/server-c.html to /root/server-c-web-check.txt.
On server, route local6 log messages to /var/log/server-c-local6.log and write a test message.
On client, create /root/exam-c-report.txt containing REPORT-C and copy it to server:/root/exam-c-report.txt.
hints: Make changes persistent unless a question says otherwise.
Use local repositories and local documentation; do not depend on internet access.
Flatpak and systemd timer tasks belong to the RHCSA 10 track.
checks: echo cinder9 | su - root -c whoami 2>/dev/null | grep -qx root && hostnamectl --static | grep -qx clientc.exam10.lab && grep -Eq '^192\.168\.122\.3[[:space:]]+serverc\.exam10\.lab$' /etc/hosts

connection_name="System eth1"; nmcli -g NAME connection show "$connection_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || connection_name="$(private_dev="$(ip -o -4 addr show | awk '$4 ~ /^192\.168\.122\./ {print $2; exit}')"; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active | awk -F: -v private_dev="$private_dev" '$2 == private_dev {print $1; exit}')"; test -n "$connection_name" && nmcli -g ipv4.addresses connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.62/24' && nmcli -g ipv4.gateway connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.1' && nmcli -g ipv4.dns connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '192.168.122.3' && nmcli -g ipv4.method connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx manual
test "$(cat /var/www/html/examc.html 2>/dev/null)" = EXAMC && systemctl is-enabled httpd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active

grep -Eq '^Listen[[:space:]]+8102$' /etc/httpd/conf.d/examc-port.conf && semanage port -l | awk '$1 == "http_port_t" && $2 == "tcp" && $0 ~ /(^|[ ,])8102([, ]|$)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}' && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active && ss -ltn | awk '$4 ~ /(^|:)8102$/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; hostnamectl --static | grep -qx serverc.exam10.lab && awk '"'"'$1 == "192.168.122.62" {for (i = 2; i <= NF; i++) if ($i == "clientc.exam10.lab") found = 1} END {exit !found}'"'"' /etc/hosts && connection_name="System eth1"; nmcli -g NAME connection show "$connection_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || connection_name="$(private_dev="$(ip -o -4 addr show | awk '"'"'$4 ~ /^192\.168\.122\./ {print $2; exit}'"'"')"; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active | awk -F: -v private_dev="$private_dev" '"'"'$2 == private_dev {print $1; exit}'"'"')"; test -n "$connection_name" && nmcli -g ipv4.addresses connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '"'"'192.168.122.3/24'"'"' && nmcli -g ipv4.gateway connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '"'"'192.168.122.1'"'"' && nmcli -g ipv4.dns connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx '"'"'192.168.122.3'"'"' && nmcli -g ipv4.method connection show "$connection_name" | grep -qx manual'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; getent group serverc10 >/dev/null && stat -c '"'"'%U:%G:%a'"'"' /srv/serverc10 | grep -qx root:serverc10:2770'
systemctl cat examctimer.timer | grep -Fqx 'OnCalendar=*:0/10' && systemctl is-enabled examctimer.timer | grep -qx enabled

lv_path=/dev/vgc10/datac; mapper_path=/dev/mapper/vgc10-datac; mountpoint=/mnt/datac10; lv_uuid="$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$lv_path")"; lvs "$lv_path" >/dev/null 2>&1 && findmnt -no TARGET "$mountpoint" | grep -qx "$mountpoint" && awk -v dev="$lv_path" -v mapper="$mapper_path" -v uuid="$lv_uuid" -v target="$mountpoint" '$1 !~ /^#/ && $2 == target && $3 == "xfs" && ($1 == dev || $1 == mapper || $1 == "UUID=" uuid || $1 == "/dev/disk/by-uuid/" uuid) {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab
firewall-cmd --permanent --query-port=8102/tcp && firewall-cmd --query-port=8102/tcp

awk 'function flush(){if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/BaseOS\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") base=1;if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/AppStream\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") app=1}function value(){sub(/^[^=]*=/, ""); gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t]+$/, ""); return $0}/^[[:space:]]*\[/ {flush(); baseurl=enabled=gpgcheck=""; next}/^[[:space:]]*baseurl[[:space:]]*=/ {baseurl=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*enabled[[:space:]]*=/ {enabled=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*gpgcheck[[:space:]]*=/ {gpgcheck=value(); next}END{flush(); exit !(base && app)}' /etc/yum.repos.d/*.repo && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; awk '"'"'function flush(){if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/BaseOS\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") base=1;if(baseurl ~ /^http:\/\/server\/repo\/AppStream\/?$/ && enabled == "1" && gpgcheck == "0") app=1}function value(){sub(/^[^=]*=/, ""); gsub(/^[ \t]+|[ \t]+$/, ""); return $0}/^[[:space:]]*\[/ {flush(); baseurl=enabled=gpgcheck=""; next}/^[[:space:]]*baseurl[[:space:]]*=/ {baseurl=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*enabled[[:space:]]*=/ {enabled=value(); next}/^[[:space:]]*gpgcheck[[:space:]]*=/ {gpgcheck=value(); next}END{flush(); exit !(base && app)}'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/*.repo'
flatpak remotes --system --columns=name,url 2>/dev/null | awk '$1 == "examcflatpak" && $2 == "file:///opt/rhcsa/flatpak/repo" {found=1} END {exit !found}'
flatpak list --system --app --columns=application 2>/dev/null | grep -qx org.rhcsa.Tools
getent group teamc10 >/dev/null && id -nG userc10 | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx teamc10
grep -ERq '^%teamc10[[:space:]]+ALL=\(ALL\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]*/usr/bin/systemctl$' /etc/sudoers.d

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq '"'"'^%serverc10[[:space:]]+ALL=\(ALL\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]*/usr/bin/systemctl$'"'"' /etc/sudoers.d/serverc10-systemctl && visudo -cf /etc/sudoers.d/serverc10-systemctl >/dev/null'
ls -Z /var/www/html/c.html | grep -q httpd_sys_content_t

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq RHCSA10-C /var/www/html/server-c.html && grep -Eq '"'"'^Listen[[:space:]]+8202$'"'"' /etc/httpd/conf.d/exam-c-port.conf && semanage port -l | awk '"'"'$1 == "http_port_t" && $2 == "tcp" && $0 ~ /(^|[ ,])8202([, ]|$)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' && firewall-cmd --permanent --query-port=8202/tcp && firewall-cmd --query-port=8202/tcp && systemctl is-enabled httpd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; files=""; test -d /var/log/journal && systemctl is-active systemd-journald | grep -qx active && files=$(find /etc/systemd -maxdepth 2 \( -path /etc/systemd/journald.conf -o -path '"'"'/etc/systemd/journald.conf.d/*.conf'"'"' \) -type f 2>/dev/null); test -n "$files" && awk '"'"'FNR == 1 {in_journal=0} /^[[:space:]]*\[Journal\][[:space:]]*($|#)/ {in_journal=1; next} /^[[:space:]]*\[/ {in_journal=0} in_journal && /^[[:space:]]*Storage[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*persistent[[:space:]]*($|#)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' $files'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl is-enabled serverctimer.timer | grep -qx enabled && grep -Eq '"'"'^OnCalendar=\*:0/5$'"'"' /etc/systemd/system/serverctimer.timer && grep -Fxq '"'"'echo SERVER-C >> /var/log/serverctimer.log'"'"' /usr/local/sbin/serverctimer.sh'

findmnt -no SOURCE,TARGET /mnt/cprojects | grep -qx 'server:/exports/exam-c /mnt/cprojects' && grep -Eq '^server:/exports/exam-c[[:space:]]+/mnt/cprojects[[:space:]]+nfs([[:space:]]|$)' /etc/fstab && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq "^/exports/exam-c[[:space:]]+192\\.168\\.122\\.0/24" /etc/exports.d/exam-c-integrated.exports && systemctl is-active nfs-server | grep -qx active'
grep -Fxq RHCSA10-C /root/server-c-web-check.txt

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq '"'"'^local6\.\*[[:space:]]+/var/log/server-c-local6\.log$'"'"' /etc/rsyslog.d/server-c-local6.conf && systemctl is-active rsyslog | grep -qx active && grep -Fq '"'"'server-c-local6'"'"' /var/log/server-c-local6.log'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq REPORT-C /root/exam-c-report.txt'
solution_outline: Work through each question independently and verify before moving on.
task_titles: Publish a web page /var/www/html/examc.html containing EXAMC and enable
Configure the server hostname and persistent IPv4 networking
Create /srv/serverc10 owned by root:serverc10 with mode 2770
Allow TCP port 8102 permanently in firewalld and reload
Allow %teamc10 to run /usr/bin/systemctl without a password
Create /var/www/html/c.html and restore its default SELinux context
solution_commands: nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.addresses 192.168.122.62/24 ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3 ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes
semanage port -a -t http_port_t -p tcp 8102 2>/dev/null || semanage port -m -t http_port_t -p tcp 8102

nmcli -g NAME connection show "$connection_name" >/dev/null 2>&1 || connection_name="$(private_dev="$(ip -o -4 addr show | awk '$4 ~ /^192\.168\.122\./ {print $2; exit}')"; nmcli -t -f NAME,DEVICE connection show --active | awk -F: -v private_dev="$private_dev" '$2 == private_dev {print $1; exit}')"
nmcli connection modify "$connection_name" ipv4.addresses 192.168.122.3/24 ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3 ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF

cat > /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa10-exam.repo <<'EOF'
[rhcsa10-exam-baseos]
name=RHCSA10 Exam BaseOS
baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0

[rhcsa10-exam-appstream]
name=RHCSA10 Exam AppStream
baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/
enabled=1
gpgcheck=0
EOF
semanage port -a -t http_port_t -p tcp 8202 2>/dev/null || semanage port -m -t http_port_t -p tcp 8202

cat > /etc/systemd/system/serverctimer.service <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Server C timer job

[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/local/sbin/serverctimer.sh
EOF

cat > /etc/systemd/system/serverctimer.timer <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Run server C timer job

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*:0/5
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
EOF
